name: DNA Payment Rail Bridge
description: Bridges DNA x402 micropayment audit logs and signed receipts into Liquefy vaults as proof artifacts. Enables Pay-Prove-Pack workflow for AI agent commerce.
author: Dark Null Apex

output_structure.telemetry.jsonl: All audit events in Liquefy telemetry format
output_structure.receipts.jsonl: All proof artifacts as NDJSON bulk

integration.tracevault_pack: Pack the output directory into a .null vault
integration.liquefy_audit_chain: Receipts form a hash chain compatible with Liquefy audit verify
